Gautam Gambhir Faces Mounting BCCI Pressure in 2025

Dec 28, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

BCCI Signals Grow Louder Around Gautam Gambhir in 2025

Gautam Gambhir’s tenure as India’s head coach has entered a critical phase as white-ball trophies clash with unresolved red-ball concerns under the BCCI’s ongoing review.
